arguments.content:
---
created_at: "2026-04-24T18:00:00+08:00"
version: "1.0"
type: deployment_notes
---

# Sprint 10 Features — Staging Deployment Notes

**Deployment Window**: 2026-04-27T02:00:00+08:00 — 2026-04-27T04:00:00+08:00

**Duration**: 2 hours  
**Environment**: Staging  
**Scheduled by**: Alex Zhang

---

## Components Being Deployed

1. **Notification Service v2** (`notifications-v2.4.0`)
   - Real-time WebSocket support
   - Batch delivery optimization

2. **Batch Sync API** (`sync-api-1.2.0`)
   - Mobile client synchronization endpoint
   - Conflict resolution updates

3. **New Dashboard** (`dashboard-3.0.0-beta`)
   - Feature flagged for internal testing
   - Sprint metrics widget

4. **Enhanced Task Filtering** (`tasks-api-2.3.0`)
   - Bulk update operations
   - Archive filtering support

---

## Pre-Deployment Checklist

- [ ] All CI/CD pipelines passing
- [ ] Database migrations reviewed and approved
- [ ] Configuration changes validated in dev environment
- [ ] Feature flags configured correctly in staging
- [ ] Monitoring dashboards verified
- [ ] On-call engineer notified and available
- [ ] Rollback plan documented and reviewed

---

## Rollback Trigger Conditions

**Immediate Rollback Required If:**

1. Error rate exceeds 1% for more than 5 minutes
2. P95 response time exceeds 500ms for more than 10 minutes
3. Any component health check failing for more than 3 minutes
4. Database connection pool exhaustion detected
5. Critical user journey (login, task creation) broken

**Rollback Procedure:**
1. Execute `kubectl rollout undo deployment/<component>`
2. Revert database migrations if applicable
3. Notify team via #alerts channel
4. Create incident ticket in Jira

---

## On-Call Contacts

| Role | Name | Contact |
|------|------|---------|
| Tech Lead | Alex Zhang | alex.zhang@oriontech.com / +86-138-0000-0001 |
| Backend Lead | Bai | bai@oriontech.com / +86-138-0000-0002 |
| DevOps | Chen | chen@oriontech.com / +86-138-0000-0003 |
| QA Lead | Dana | dana@oriontech.com / +86-138-0000-0004 |
| Escalation | Manager | manager@oriontech.com / +86-138-0000-0000 |

---

## Post-Deployment Verification

- [ ] Smoke tests pass on staging environment
- [ ] Integration tests complete successfully
- [ ] Performance metrics within acceptable bounds
- [ ] Feature flags functioning correctly
- [ ] Dashboard accessible to internal users

---

## Notes

- Deployment scheduled during low-traffic window
- Monitoring alert thresholds temporarily increased to reduce noise
- Full production deployment pending successful staging verification

content.text:
# Project Orion API Changelog

Last Updated: April 24, 2026

## Sprint 10 Week 1 (2026-04-20 to 2026-04-24)

### New Endpoints
- `GET /notifications/v2` — Real-time notification stream (WebSocket ready) — Added 2026-04-21
- `POST /sync/batch` — Batch sync endpoint for mobile clients — Added 2026-04-22
- `PUT /tasks/bulk-update` — Bulk update task properties — Added 2026-04-22
- `GET /dashboard/metrics` — Retrieve dashboard performance metrics — Added 2026-04-23
- `POST /export/json` — Export data in JSON format — Added 2026-04-24
- `POST /export/csv` — Export data in CSV format — Added 2026-04-24
- `GET /metrics/sprint` — Retrieve sprint performance metrics — Added 2026-04-24

### Modified Endpoints
- `GET /tasks` — Added `include_archived` query parameter
- `POST /export` — Added support for CSV format (previously JSON only)

### Breaking Changes
None in this sprint week.

### Deprecations
- `GET /notifications/v1` — Deprecated in favor of `/notifications/v2`, sunset scheduled for Sprint 12

## Sprint 9 (2026-04-07 to 2026-04-17)

### New Endpoints
- `GET /tasks/filter` — Filter tasks by priority and status
- `POST /dashboard/widgets` — Create custom dashboard widgets
- `GET /export/preview` — Preview data export (beta)

### Breaking Changes
None in this sprint.
